description_long: This cabinetry set consists of five distinct units, each with a sleek, modern design and a uniform black finish. The set includes two open-shelf units, one larger and one smaller, as well as three drawer units of varying sizes. The drawer units feature horizontal bar pulls, contributing to a minimalist aesthetic. The surfaces are flat and smooth, with a glossy sheen that reflects light subtly. The overall construction suggests the use of engineered wood or MDF with a laminate or lacquered finish, making it suitable for urban interiors such as offices, lobbies, or apartment entryways.
description: A modern black cabinetry set with open shelves and multiple drawer units, featuring sleek bar pulls and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five cabinetry units, including open shelves and drawers with visible bar pulls.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth and boxy profile of the units, with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the solid backs of the cabinetry units, with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the depth and clean lines of the cabinetry, similar to view 1.
